questions.question: What is the virus that causes COVID-19?
questions.explanation: COVID-19 is caused by the SARS-CoV-2 virus.

questions.question: Which of the following is a common symptom of COVID-19?
questions.explanation: Loss of taste or smell is a common symptom.

questions.question: How does COVID-19 primarily spread?
questions.explanation: It spreads via droplets from coughing/sneezing.
